title: Roundtable State Card Template
description: Validates state card templates used to compose the outer affordance card for a user-facing state. Required fields: state_name, personas, rendering_mode, invariants, valid_transitions, template_ref, preferred_tools. Max total lines hint for output budget. Traces: FR-001, AC-001-01.

state_name.description: Name of the user-facing state this card represents (e.g., CONVERSATION, PRESENTING_REQUIREMENTS)

domain.description: Domain label for output grouping (e.g., Requirements, Architecture, Design)

active.description: Whether this persona is active in the current state

role.description: Role description for this persona in this state

personas.description: Active personas for this state with their roles

rendering_mode.description: Rendering mode governing LLM output format for this state

invariants.description: Invariant rules that must hold throughout this state (e.g., 'Four-domain confirmation sequence is sequential, never collapsed', 'Bullets only, grouped by domain label')

condition.description: Human-readable condition for this transition (e.g., 'all personas participated', 'user accepts')

next_state.description: Target state when condition is met

valid_transitions.description: Valid outgoing transitions from this state

template_ref.description: Reference to the full template file for this state card (relative path from state-cards/), or null if inline

priority.description: Tool priority level in the hierarchy

preferred_tools.description: Preferred tool hierarchy for this state, ordered by priority

max_total_lines.description: Hint for maximum total lines in the composed state card output (default ~40 per module-design.md)
